Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIEL BROME, ESQ., 510.337.1001, FOR PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Granted, no opposition filed. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
